
### exceptions and OOO (one strategy) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-7.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-8.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-9.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=9}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-10.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=10}

![](/ooo/texfig/exceptions-and-ooo.figure-11.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=11}


:::
